title: Sanjh Aur Savera
writer: Dhruva Chatterjee, Anil Ghosh, Jagdish Kanwal
plot: Dr. Shankar Chaudhry lives a wealthy lifestyle in Bombay with his widowed mom, Rukmini, and younger sister, Manju. His mom would like him to get married to Ambala-based Advocate Madhusudan's daughter, Maya, even though neither of ...
